markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate Bright Data as a data vendor for AI visibility metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Core Value Prop:** Compliant data scraping (2.5 PB/day) via a contracted proxy network, proven by winning legal challenges from Elon Musk and Facebook.](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [**Flexible Licensing:** GrowthX owns all scraped data in perpetuity, enabling redistribution to end customers without additional fees.](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [**Key Feature Gap:** "Query fanout" (tracking AI's internal search queries) is in development but not yet available.](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [**Action Plan:** GrowthX to create a free account for a trial; Bright Data will provide public case studies and add trial credits upon receipt of the account number.](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Data Needs

  - [GrowthX is evaluating data vendors for a new initiative on AI visibility metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [**Required Data:**](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
      - [AI mentions & citations](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
      - [Keyword & search volume](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
  - [**Key Evaluation Criteria:**](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=220.0)
      - [AI platform coverage (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude)](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
      - [Data collection methodology (e.g., panel vs. probing)](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
      - [Pricing & licensing for embedding and redistributing data to end customers](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)

### Bright Data's Solution

  - [**Scale & Compliance:**](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Scrapes \~2.5 petabytes of data daily.](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
      - [Strict compliance (no login screens, transparent ToS) → won legal challenges from Elon Musk and Facebook.](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [**Technical Foundation:**](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
      - [Built on the world's largest proxy network, where every device is contracted for reliability.](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
      - [All tools are API-based, charged per successful record (not 404s).](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [**Tooling Options:**](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
      - [**Pre-built APIs:** For popular sites (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, Amazon).](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
      - [**Browser APIs & Unlockers:** To bypass blockers on sites without dedicated APIs.](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [**IDE Environment:** For building custom scrapers (client-managed maintenance).](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [**Managed Service:** Bright Data can build and maintain custom scrapers for a list of sites.](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)

### Licensing & Pricing

  - [**Licensing:** GrowthX owns all scraped data in perpetuity, with full rights to redistribute it to end customers without additional fees.](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [**Pricing:**](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
      - [Standard rate card: $1.50 per 1,000 successful scrapes.](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=997.0)
      - [Flexible pricing for embedded use cases to ensure client profitability.](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

### Feature Gap: Query Fanout

  - [**Need:** Track the internal search queries an AI model makes to generate its answer.](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [**Status:** Not currently available.](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [**Rationale:** High customer interest (70% of Mike's calls) → product team is actively developing it.](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bright Data:**](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
      - [Provide public case studies on AI-related scraping.](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)
      - [Add trial credits to GrowthX's account upon receiving the account number.](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
      - [Create a free Bright Data account.](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
      - [Share the account number with Bright Data to receive trial credits.](https://fathom.video/share/jTDbXkBszoDGK9YqEXLsKrGs824zfZGc?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
